/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/go2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/go2_interfaces/srv/detail/checkpoint_capture__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/go2_interfaces/srv/detail/mission_control__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
